title: 17 companies that have said they're doing AI-related layoffs
byline: Ana Altchek, Kelsey Vlamis, Shubhangi Goel, Katherine (Tangalakis-Lippert) Ortiz, Huileng Tan
excerpt: A number of companies, including Uber, Cisco, and Block, have attributed recent staff reductions to AI.

By Ana Altchek

Worries about AI one day replacing human workers have intensified recently — and as it turns out, that future may be here.

A number of companies have recently announced staff cuts and cited AI efficiencies as a major rationale.

A March report from career transition firm Challenger, Gray, and Christmas found that, so far this year, AI has been cited in 8% of job-cut plans.

Amid this rash of layoffs, some have asked whether AI is replacing so many roles once held by humans or whether some degree of "AI washing" is at work. OpenAI's Sam Altman said some companies are blaming AI for layoffs that would've happened regardless.

An MIT study released last year said that 95% of corporate AI investments have generated "zero return" so far.

As some companies replace human workers with the technology, they may end up hiring more people because of it — or rehiring at least some of the roles they eliminated. A 2025 survey conducted by consulting firm Robert Half found that 29% of 2,000 hiring managers said they reopened positions that had been previously got rid of after implementing AI.

Here's a list of companies that have done AI-related layoffs:

Angi

Angi, the popular contractor listing site previously known as Angie's List, said in January that it was cutting roughly 350 jobs in part because of "AI-driven efficiency improvements."

The company added that the cuts were part of a plan "to reduce operating expenses and optimize the organizational structure in support of long-term growth."

Atlassian

Atlassian announced cuts of 1,600 jobs in March, totaling about 10% of its global workforce. The move comes as the Australian-American software company says it is restructuring to focus on AI and enterprise growth.

In a filing with the US Securities and Exchange Commission, the company said the reduction was part of a broader effort to reposition the business for what CEO Mike Cannon-Brookes described as the "AI era."

"It would be disingenuous to pretend AI doesn't change the mix of skills we need or the number of roles required in certain areas. It does," Cannon-Brookes wrote in a message to employees.

On the "20VC" podcast in October last year, prior to the cuts, Cannon-Brookes said he planned to have more engineers at the company in five years.

"They will be more efficient, but technology creation is not output-bound," Cannon-Brookes said.

Block

In a post on X in February, billionaire and Block CEO Jack Dorsey said he was slashing nearly half of Block's workforce, cutting its over 10,000-person staff to under 6,000. The move came as he said business was strong and profits were growing, but a new way of working was emerging.

"We're already seeing that the intelligence tools we're creating and using, paired with smaller and flatter teams, are enabling a new way of working which fundamentally changes what it means to build and run a company," Dorsey said in his memo on X.

In the company's earnings call following the memo, Dorsey said that more companies will follow suit by using AI to drive efficiency gains. Block is already ahead of the trend that "all companies will eventually" adopt, the CEO said.

Cisco

Cisco said on May 13 that it would cut "fewer than 4,000 jobs" as the networking company reorganizes around artificial intelligence, according to a memo CEO Chuck Robbins sent to employees.

"The companies that will win in the AI era will be those with focus, urgency, and the discipline to continuously shift investment toward the areas where demand and long-term value creation are strongest," Robbins said in the memo. "This means making hard decisions — about where we invest, how we're organized, and how our cost structure reflects the opportunity in front of us."

The layoffs, which account for less than 5% of Cisco's workforce, were announced alongside a stronger-than-expected third-quarter earnings report in which the company raised its revenue outlook amid surging demand for AI infrastructure.

In the memo, Robbins said Cisco is redirecting investments toward areas "where demand and long-term value creation are strongest," including silicon, optics, security, and employees' use of AI across the company.

Cloudflare

Cloudflare announced on May 7 that it will be slashing more than 1,100 roles as it reorganizes for the "agentic AI era." The cybersecurity company said in a memo that its AI usage has increased by over 600% in the last three months, and employees across departments run thousands of agent sessions each day.

"That means we have to be intentional in how we architect our company for the agentic AI era in order to supercharge the value we deliver to our customers," the company said in the memo to staff.

Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince responded to a critical post on X, saying that "very few engineers or customer-facing sales people impacted by our layoff."

He wrote that the company will continue to hire "like crazy in those roles," as it did as a startup. Cloudflare employed 5,483 people as of the end of March, meaning the cuts affected about 20% of its workforce.

Coinbase

Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong announced that the company will be slashing 14% of its workforce, or about 700 workers.

In a post on X on May 5, Armstrong shared an email that he said he sent to workers earlier that day. In the post, he cited two factors: a volatile market and AI changing the way people work.

"Over the past year, I've watched engineers use AI to ship in days what used to take a team weeks," Armstrong said, adding that, "the pace of what's possible with a small, focused team has changed dramatically."

Armstrong said the company isn't just reducing head count and cutting costs, but "fundamentally changing" the way it operates. The CEO said Coinbase is rebuilding itself "as an intelligence, with humans around the edge aligning it."

He shared plans to concentrate the workforce around AI-native pods that will manage fleets of agents. Armstrong said the company will also experiment with "one person teams" of engineers, designers, and product managers.

Crypto.com

Crypto.com announced on March 19 that it would cut 12% of its staff. The CEO, Kris Marszalek, wrote in a post on X that those impacted were in "roles that do not adapt in our new world."

"We are joining the list of companies integrating enterprise-wide AI," Marszalek wrote on X. "Companies that move immediately and pair the best AI tools with top-performers will achieve a level of scale and precision that was previously impossible. This is where we must go."

The company previously cut jobs in 2022 during a cryptocurrency slump and another 20% of its workforce in 2023, following the collapse of FTX.

GitLab

On a June 2 earnings call, GitLab said it is cutting 350 employees, or about 14% of its workforce, as part of an overhaul it announced last month.

The coding software company, which had 2,580 employees as of January, said in May that it was restructuring to meet the "agentic era." GitLab added that it wanted to remove up to three layers of management and reinvest savings from the restructuring into internal AI resources.

The company said it also expects to exit 22 countries and reduce its team members' geographic footprint by about 37%, opting for customers in those regions to be served by partners.

In June 2025, GitLab's chief financial officer, Brian Robins, said that AI coding has been good for its business, as customers added more employees to their subscriptions and produced more code, which GitLab's services help manage.

HP

HP said it's reducing the size of its corporate workforce due to AI initiatives. In an earnings report last November, the company said it plans to cut between 4,000 and 6,000 jobs by the end of 2028, estimating the changes would save around $1 billion.

HP's earnings presentation at the time said part of its strategy was to cut costs through "workforce reductions, platform simplification, programs consolidation, and productivity measures" and to increase customer satisfaction, innovation, and productivity with "artificial intelligence adoption and enablement."

IBM

Arvind Krishna, CEO of IBM, told The Wall Street Journal last year that it had replaced hundreds of human resources employees with AI.

More recently, the company announced last November that it would cut thousands of workers in the fourth quarter of 2025, affecting a "single-digit percentage of its global workforce." Its CEO, Arvind Krishna, said the company is shifting priorities to hire more people around AI and quantum. He also said the company plans to increase hiring among recent college graduates over the next year.

Krishna has also said that AI adoption has led the company to hire more employees in programming and sales.

In 2023, Krishna told Bloomberg that IBM had halted or slowed hiring for back-office roles, like in human resources, that could be replaced by AI.

"I could easily see 30% of that getting replaced by AI and automation over a five-year period," he told the outlet at the time.

Oracle

Oracle said in a June 22 filing that AI is contributing to workforce reductions. The company's headcount fell by roughly 21,000 employees, or 13%, over the past year. Oracle reported 141,000 employees as of May 31.

The cuts come as Oracle invests heavily in AI infrastructure.

"The adoption and deployment of AI technologies across our operations have resulted, and may continue to result, in reductions to our workforce," Oracle said in the filing.

The company spent $1.84 billion on severance and other restructuring costs in fiscal 2026, up from $374 million a year earlier.

Salesforce

Salesforce cut fewer than 1,000 workers in February, including employees from marketing, product management, data analytics, and its Agentforce AI product.

In an episode of "The Logan Bartlett Show" released last August, Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff said the company was using AI agents in its customer support division to replace humans and handle more sales leads.

"I was able to rebalance my head count on my support," he said in the interview. "I've reduced it from 9,000 heads to about 5,000 because I need less heads."

A Salesforce spokesperson previously told Business Insider that Benioff was referring to an organizational transformation that took place over several months to reshape its customer support function.

After deploying Agentforce, the company no longer needed to "actively backfill support engineer roles," the spokesperson said, adding that it successfully redeployed hundreds of employees into other areas of the company, like professional services, sales, and customer success.

Snap

In a memo to employees released in a regulatory filing on April 15, Snap CEO Evan Spiegel said the company would cut 1,000 employees, or about 16% of its global workforce. The CEO cited "rapid advancements" in AI and "small squads" using it to become more efficient.

Spiegel said Snap would also close more than 300 open roles, and that US-based employees would receive four months of severance, healthcare coverage, and equity vesting. In an investor update included in the company's filing, it said the layoffs would result in roughly $500 million in annualized cost savings.

Standard Chartered

Global bank Standard Chartered announced plans on May 19 to slash 15% of its staff by 2030.

CEO Bill Winters said in a media briefing in Hong Kong that the move isn't a cost-cutting effort, but rather, "replacing, in some cases, lower-value human capital with the financial capital and the investment capital that we are putting in," Bloomberg reported.

"We don't have job losses, but we do have job role reductions in favor of the machines, and that will accelerate as we go forward into AI," he said at the briefing.

The company added in a statement: "We are combining the best human talent with AI, investing to support our people into higher-value roles."

Uber

Uber laid off about 10% of its customer service workers and asked remote workers to relocate to a city with an office and work there three days a week, it said in a statement on July 23. Bloomberg earlier reported the news.

Uber's vice president of global community operations, Megha Yethadka, wrote in a memo to the team on July 22 that AI provides "a massive opportunity" to "accelerate output, improve quality, and scale customer solutions at pace."

Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi has said that the company is slowing down hiring as it invests more in AI.

Wisetech

Zubin Appoo, the CEO of Wisetech, said the logistics software maker is cutting 2,000 jobs, or 30% of its staff, because of AI-led efficiency.

In a conference call on February 25, Appoo said that AI enables greater productivity in less time and with fewer employees. The Sydney-based company employed about 7,000 people, according to an annual report released in October.

"I am prepared to say this clearly: the era of manually writing code as the core act of engineering is over," Appoo said. The technology is "unlocking levels of efficiency gains across WiseTech that were previously out of reach."

In some parts of the workforce, such as customer service, one in two workers will disappear, he added.

Wix

Wix announced it would be cutting 20% of its workforce, citing currency challenges and AI. In a post on X on May 28, Wix CEO Avishai Abrahami shared the layoff memo he sent to the team, saying that the first reason for the cuts was that the "exchange rate between the Shekel and the US dollar has shifted significantly."

He also cited "the fast evolution of AI capabilities."

"This is not just about adopting new tools - it is about rewiring how companies are built, how they think, how they manage and how they operate," Abrahami wrote in the post.

Abrahami said the company will operate leaner and flatter, and will continue to take steps toward an AI-native way of working. The company previously employed just under 5,300 workers, meaning roughly 1,000 roles will be affected.

Correction: May 19, 2026 — An earlier version of this story included Klarna. The company says it has not done AI-related layoffs.

sentences.en: Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi, IBM CEO Arvind Krishna, Block CEO Jack Dorsey(left to right).
sentences.zh: Uber 首席执行官 Dara Khosrowshahi、IBM 首席执行官 Arvind Krishna、Block 首席执行官 Jack Dorsey（从左到右）。

sentences.en: Kevin Dietsch/Getty Images, Sajjad Hussain/Getty Images, Joe Raedle/Getty Images
sentences.zh: Kevin Dietsch/Getty Images、Sajjad Hussain/Getty Images、Joe Raedle/Getty Images

blocks.html_en: Worries about AI one day replacing human workers have intensified recently — and as it turns out, that future may be here.

sentences.en: Worries about AI one day replacing human workers have intensified recently — and as it turns out, that future may be here.
sentences.zh: 最近，人们对人工智能有一天会取代人类工人的担忧愈演愈烈——事实证明，未来可能就在这里。

blocks.html_en: A number of companies have recently announced staff cuts and cited AI efficiencies as a major rationale.

sentences.en: A number of companies have recently announced staff cuts and cited AI efficiencies as a major rationale.
sentences.zh: 许多公司最近宣布裁员，并将人工智能效率作为主要原因。

blocks.html_en: A March report from career transition firm Challenger, Gray, and Christmas found that, so far this year, AI has been cited in 8% of job-cut plans.

sentences.en: A March report from career transition firm Challenger, Gray, and Christmas found that, so far this year, AI has been cited in 8% of job-cut plans.
sentences.zh: 职业转型公司 Challenger、Grey 和 Christmas 3 月份的一份报告发现，今年到目前为止，8% 的裁员计划中都提到了人工智能。

blocks.html_en: Amid this rash of layoffs, some have asked whether AI is replacing so many roles once held by humans or whether some degree of "AI washing" is at work. OpenAI's Sam Altman said some companies are blaming AI for layoffs that would've happened regardless.

sentences.en: Amid this rash of layoffs, some have asked whether AI is replacing so many roles once held by humans or whether some degree of "AI washing" is at work.
sentences.zh: 在这波裁员潮中，一些人质疑人工智能是否正在取代人类曾经担任的如此多的角色，或者是否存在某种程度的“人工智能清洗”在起作用。

sentences.en: OpenAI's Sam Altman said some companies are blaming AI for layoffs that would've happened regardless.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 的 Sam Altman 表示，一些公司将裁员归咎于人工智能，而裁员无论如何都会发生。

blocks.html_en: An MIT study released last year said that 95% of corporate AI investments have generated "zero return" so far.

sentences.en: An MIT study released last year said that 95% of corporate AI investments have generated "zero return" so far.
sentences.zh: 麻省理工学院去年发布的一项研究称，迄今为止，95%的企业人工智能投资产生了“零回报”。

blocks.html_en: As some companies replace human workers with the technology, they may end up hiring more people because of it — or rehiring at least some of the roles they eliminated. A 2025 survey conducted by consulting firm Robert Half found that 29% of 2,000 hiring managers said they reopened positions that had been previously got rid of after implementing AI.

sentences.en: As some companies replace human workers with the technology, they may end up hiring more people because of it — or rehiring at least some of the roles they eliminated.
sentences.zh: 随着一些公司用技术取代人类工人，他们最终可能会因此而雇用更多的人，或者至少重新雇用一些被他们淘汰的职位。

sentences.en: A 2025 survey conducted by consulting firm Robert Half found that 29% of 2,000 hiring managers said they reopened positions that had been previously got rid of after implementing AI.
sentences.zh: 咨询公司 Robert Half 进行的 2025 年调查发现，2000 名招聘经理中有 29% 表示，他们在实施人工智能后重新开设了之前被裁掉的职位。

blocks.html_en: Here's a list of companies that have done AI-related layoffs:

sentences.en: Here's a list of companies that have done AI-related layoffs:
sentences.zh: 以下是已进行人工智能相关裁员的公司名单：

blocks.html_en: Angi

sentences.en: Angi said it was cutting 350 jobs in January.
sentences.zh: Angi 表示 1 月份将裁员 350 人。

sentences.en: Bloomberg/Getty Images
sentences.zh: 彭博社/盖蒂图片社

blocks.html_en: Angi, the popular contractor listing site previously known as Angie's List, said in January that it was cutting roughly 350 jobs in part because of "AI-driven efficiency improvements."

sentences.en: Angi, the popular contractor listing site previously known as Angie's List, said in January that it was cutting roughly 350 jobs in part because of "AI-driven efficiency improvements."
sentences.zh: Angi 是一家颇受欢迎的承包商列表网站，之前被称为 Angie's List，该网站在一月份表示，该公司将裁员约 350 人，部分原因是“人工智能驱动的效率提高”。

blocks.html_en: The company added that the cuts were part of a plan "to reduce operating expenses and optimize the organizational structure in support of long-term growth."

sentences.en: The company added that the cuts were part of a plan "to reduce operating expenses and optimize the organizational structure in support of long-term growth."
sentences.zh: 该公司补充说，此次裁员是“减少运营费用并优化组织结构以支持长期增长”计划的一部分。

blocks.html_en: Atlassian

sentences.en: Atlassian
sentences.zh: 阿特拉斯

sentences.en: Atlassian CEO Mike Cannon-Brookes.
sentences.zh: Atlassian 首席执行官迈克·坎农-布鲁克斯 (Mike Cannon-Brookes)。

sentences.en: Brendan McDermid/Reuters
sentences.zh: 布伦丹·麦克德米德/路透社

blocks.html_en: Atlassian announced cuts of 1,600 jobs in March, totaling about 10% of its global workforce. The move comes as the Australian-American software company says it is restructuring to focus on AI and enterprise growth.

sentences.en: Atlassian announced cuts of 1,600 jobs in March, totaling about 10% of its global workforce.
sentences.zh: Atlassian 3 月份宣布裁员 1,600 人，约占其全球员工总数的 10%。

sentences.en: The move comes as the Australian-American software company says it is restructuring to focus on AI and enterprise growth.
sentences.zh: 此举出台之际，这家澳美软件公司表示正在重组，以专注于人工智能和企业增长。

blocks.html_en: In a filing with the US Securities and Exchange Commission, the company said the reduction was part of a broader effort to reposition the business for what CEO Mike Cannon-Brookes described as the "AI era."

sentences.en: In a filing with the US Securities and Exchange Commission, the company said the reduction was part of a broader effort to reposition the business for what CEO Mike Cannon-Brookes described as the "AI era."
sentences.zh: 该公司在向美国证券交易委员会提交的文件中表示，此次裁员是为适应首席执行官迈克·坎农-布鲁克斯所说的“人工智能时代”而重新定位业务的更广泛努力的一部分。

blocks.html_en: "It would be disingenuous to pretend AI doesn't change the mix of skills we need or the number of roles required in certain areas. It does," Cannon-Brookes wrote in a message to employees.

sentences.en: "It would be disingenuous to pretend AI doesn't change the mix of skills we need or the number of roles required in certain areas.
sentences.zh: “假装人工智能不会改变我们所需的技能组合或某些领域所需的角色数量是不诚实的。

sentences.en: It does," Cannon-Brookes wrote in a message to employees.
sentences.zh: 确实如此，”坎农-布鲁克斯在给员工的一封信中写道。

blocks.html_en: On the "20VC" podcast in October last year, prior to the cuts, Cannon-Brookes said he planned to have more engineers at the company in five years.

sentences.en: On the "20VC" podcast in October last year, prior to the cuts, Cannon-Brookes said he planned to have more engineers at the company in five years.
sentences.zh: 在去年 10 月裁员之前的“2​​0VC”播客中，Cannon-Brookes 表示，他计划在五年内为公司增加更多工程师。

blocks.html_en: "They will be more efficient, but technology creation is not output-bound," Cannon-Brookes said.

sentences.en: "They will be more efficient, but technology creation is not output-bound," Cannon-Brookes said.
sentences.zh: “他们的效率会更高，但技术创造不受产出限制，”坎农-布鲁克斯说。

blocks.html_en: Block

sentences.en: Block CEO Jack Dorsey.
sentences.zh: Block 首席执行官杰克·多尔西。

sentences.en: Joe Raedle/Getty Images
sentences.zh: 乔·雷德尔/盖蒂图片社

blocks.html_en: In a post on X in February, billionaire and Block CEO Jack Dorsey said he was slashing nearly half of Block's workforce, cutting its over 10,000-person staff to under 6,000. The move came as he said business was strong and profits were growing, but a new way of working was emerging.

sentences.en: In a post on X in February, billionaire and Block CEO Jack Dorsey said he was slashing nearly half of Block's workforce, cutting its over 10,000-person staff to under 6,000.
sentences.zh: 亿万富翁、Block 首席执行官杰克·多尔西 (Jack Dorsey) 在 2 月份 X 上的一篇帖子中表示，他将裁减 Block 近一半的员工，将其 10,000 多名员工削减至 6,000 人以下。

sentences.en: The move came as he said business was strong and profits were growing, but a new way of working was emerging.
sentences.zh: 他表示，业务强劲、利润不断增长，但一种新的工作方式正在出现，因此采取了这一举措。

blocks.html_en: "We're already seeing that the intelligence tools we're creating and using, paired with smaller and flatter teams, are enabling a new way of working which fundamentally changes what it means to build and run a company," Dorsey said in his memo on X.

sentences.en: "We're already seeing that the intelligence tools we're creating and using, paired with smaller and flatter teams, are enabling a new way of working which fundamentally changes what it means to build and run a company," Dorsey said in his memo on X.
sentences.zh: 多尔西在关于 X 的备忘录中表示：“我们已经看到，我们正在创建和使用的情报工具，与更小、更扁平的团队相结合，正在实现一种新的工作方式，从根本上改变了创建和运营公司的意义。”

blocks.html_en: In the company's earnings call following the memo, Dorsey said that more companies will follow suit by using AI to drive efficiency gains. Block is already ahead of the trend that "all companies will eventually" adopt, the CEO said.

sentences.en: In the company's earnings call following the memo, Dorsey said that more companies will follow suit by using AI to drive efficiency gains.
sentences.zh: 在备忘录发布后的公司财报电话会议上，多尔西表示，更多公司将效仿，利用人工智能来提高效率。

sentences.en: Block is already ahead of the trend that "all companies will eventually" adopt, the CEO said.
sentences.zh: 这位首席执行官表示，Block 已经领先于“所有公司最终都会”采用的趋势。

blocks.html_en: Cisco

sentences.en: Cisco CEO Chuck Robbins announced on May 13 that the company would lay off about 4,000 employees.
sentences.zh: 思科首席执行官查克·罗宾斯 (Chuck Robbins) 5 月 13 日宣布，公司将裁员约 4000 名员工。

sentences.en: Kent NISHIMURA / AFP via Getty Images
sentences.zh: 西村肯特/法新社/盖蒂图片社

blocks.html_en: Cisco said on May 13 that it would cut "fewer than 4,000 jobs" as the networking company reorganizes around artificial intelligence, according to a memo CEO Chuck Robbins sent to employees.

sentences.en: Cisco said on May 13 that it would cut "fewer than 4,000 jobs" as the networking company reorganizes around artificial intelligence, according to a memo CEO Chuck Robbins sent to employees.
sentences.zh: 根据首席执行官查克·罗宾斯 (Chuck Robbins) 发给员工的一份备忘录，思科于 5 月 13 日表示，随着该网络公司围绕人工智能进行重组，该公司将裁员“不到 4,000 个职位”。

blocks.html_en: "The companies that will win in the AI era will be those with focus, urgency, and the discipline to continuously shift investment toward the areas where demand and long-term value creation are strongest," Robbins said in the memo. "This means making hard decisions — about where we invest, how we're organized, and how our cost structure reflects the opportunity in front of us."

sentences.en: "The companies that will win in the AI era will be those with focus, urgency, and the discipline to continuously shift investment toward the areas where demand and long-term value creation are strongest," Robbins said in the memo.
sentences.zh: 罗宾斯在备忘录中表示：“在人工智能时代获胜的公司将是那些具有专注力、紧迫感和纪律性的公司，能够不断将投资转向需求和长期价值创造最强的领域。”

sentences.en: "This means making hard decisions — about where we invest, how we're organized, and how our cost structure reflects the opportunity in front of us."
sentences.zh: “这意味着要做出艰难的决定——关于我们的投资地点、我们的组织方式以及我们的成本结构如何反映我们面前的机会。”

blocks.html_en: The layoffs, which account for less than 5% of Cisco's workforce, were announced alongside a stronger-than-expected third-quarter earnings report in which the company raised its revenue outlook amid surging demand for AI infrastructure.

sentences.en: The layoffs, which account for less than 5% of Cisco's workforce, were announced alongside a stronger-than-expected third-quarter earnings report in which the company raised its revenue outlook amid surging demand for AI infrastructure.
sentences.zh: 此次裁员占思科员工总数的不到 5%，是在发布强于预期的第三季度收益报告的同时宣布的，该报告在人工智能基础设施需求激增的情况下上调了收入预期。

blocks.html_en: In the memo, Robbins said Cisco is redirecting investments toward areas "where demand and long-term value creation are strongest," including silicon, optics, security, and employees' use of AI across the company.

sentences.en: In the memo, Robbins said Cisco is redirecting investments toward areas "where demand and long-term value creation are strongest," including silicon, optics, security, and employees' use of AI across the company.
sentences.zh: 罗宾斯在备忘录中表示，思科正在将投资转向“需求和长期价值创造最强的领域”，包括芯片、光学、安全以及全公司员工对人工智能的使用。

blocks.html_en: Cloudflare

sentences.en: Cloudflare
sentences.zh: 云耀

sentences.en: Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince.
sentences.zh: Cloudflare 首席执行官马修·普林斯。

sentences.en: IMF
sentences.zh: 国际货币基金组织

blocks.html_en: Cloudflare announced on May 7 that it will be slashing more than 1,100 roles as it reorganizes for the "agentic AI era." The cybersecurity company said in a memo that its AI usage has increased by over 600% in the last three months, and employees across departments run thousands of agent sessions each day.

sentences.en: Cloudflare announced on May 7 that it will be slashing more than 1,100 roles as it reorganizes for the "agentic AI era."
sentences.zh: Cloudflare 于 5 月 7 日宣布，将裁员 1,100 多人，为“代理人工智能时代”进行重组。

sentences.en: The cybersecurity company said in a memo that its AI usage has increased by over 600% in the last three months, and employees across departments run thousands of agent sessions each day.
sentences.zh: 这家网络安全公司在一份备忘录中表示，过去三个月其人工智能使用量增加了 600% 以上，各部门的员工每天运行数千次代理会话。

blocks.html_en: "That means we have to be intentional in how we architect our company for the agentic AI era in order to supercharge the value we deliver to our customers," the company said in the memo to staff.

sentences.en: "That means we have to be intentional in how we architect our company for the agentic AI era in order to supercharge the value we deliver to our customers," the company said in the memo to staff.
sentences.zh: 该公司在给员工的备忘录中表示：“这意味着我们必须有意识地为代理人工智能时代设计我们的公司，以增强我们为客户提供的价值。”

blocks.html_en: Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince responded to a critical post on X, saying that "very few engineers or customer-facing sales people impacted by our layoff."

sentences.en: Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince responded to a critical post on X, saying that "very few engineers or customer-facing sales people impacted by our layoff."
sentences.zh: Cloudflare 首席执行官 Matthew Prince 回应了 X 上的一篇批评帖子，称“很少有工程师或面向客户的销售人员受到我们裁员的影响。”

blocks.html_en: He wrote that the company will continue to hire "like crazy in those roles," as it did as a startup. Cloudflare employed 5,483 people as of the end of March, meaning the cuts affected about 20% of its workforce.

sentences.en: He wrote that the company will continue to hire "like crazy in those roles," as it did as a startup.
sentences.zh: 他写道，该公司将继续“疯狂地招聘这些职位”，就像初创公司那样。

sentences.en: Cloudflare employed 5,483 people as of the end of March, meaning the cuts affected about 20% of its workforce.
sentences.zh: 截至 3 月底，Cloudflare 拥有 5,483 名员工，这意味着裁员影响了约 20% 的员工。

blocks.html_en: Coinbase

sentences.en: Coinbase
sentences.zh: 币库

sentences.en: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong.
sentences.zh: Coinbase 首席执行官布莱恩·阿姆斯特朗。

sentences.en: Bloomberg/Getty
sentences.zh: 彭博社/盖蒂

blocks.html_en: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong announced that the company will be slashing 14% of its workforce, or about 700 workers.

sentences.en: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong announced that the company will be slashing 14% of its workforce, or about 700 workers.
sentences.zh: Coinbase 首席执行官布莱恩·阿姆斯特朗 (Brian Armstrong) 宣布，该公司将裁员 14%，即约 700 名员工。

blocks.html_en: In a post on X on May 5, Armstrong shared an email that he said he sent to workers earlier that day. In the post, he cited two factors: a volatile market and AI changing the way people work.

sentences.en: In a post on X on May 5, Armstrong shared an email that he said he sent to workers earlier that day.
sentences.zh: 在 5 月 5 日的 X 帖子中，阿姆斯特朗分享了一封电子邮件，他说这封电子邮件是他当天早些时候发送给工人的。

sentences.en: In the post, he cited two factors: a volatile market and AI changing the way people work.
sentences.zh: 在帖子中，他列举了两个因素：波动的市场和人工智能改变人们的工作方式。

blocks.html_en: "Over the past year, I've watched engineers use AI to ship in days what used to take a team weeks," Armstrong said, adding that, "the pace of what's possible with a small, focused team has changed dramatically."

sentences.en: "Over the past year, I've watched engineers use AI to ship in days what used to take a team weeks," Armstrong said, adding that, "the pace of what's possible with a small, focused team has changed dramatically."
sentences.zh: 阿姆斯特朗说：“在过去的一年里，我看到工程师们使用人工智能在几天内就完成了团队过去需要几周的时间。”他补充说，“一个小型、专注的团队可能实现的速度已经发生了巨大的变化。”

blocks.html_en: Armstrong said the company isn't just reducing head count and cutting costs, but "fundamentally changing" the way it operates. The CEO said Coinbase is rebuilding itself "as an intelligence, with humans around the edge aligning it."

sentences.en: Armstrong said the company isn't just reducing head count and cutting costs, but "fundamentally changing" the way it operates.
sentences.zh: 阿姆斯特朗表示，该公司不仅减少员工数量和削减成本，而且“从根本上改变”其运营方式。

sentences.en: The CEO said Coinbase is rebuilding itself "as an intelligence, with humans around the edge aligning it."
sentences.zh: 这位首席执行官表示，Coinbase 正在将自己重建为“一种智能，由人类在边缘调整它”。

blocks.html_en: He shared plans to concentrate the workforce around AI-native pods that will manage fleets of agents. Armstrong said the company will also experiment with "one person teams" of engineers, designers, and product managers.

sentences.en: He shared plans to concentrate the workforce around AI-native pods that will manage fleets of agents.
sentences.zh: 他分享了将劳动力集中在人工智能原生吊舱周围的计划，这些吊舱将管理代理队。

sentences.en: Armstrong said the company will also experiment with "one person teams" of engineers, designers, and product managers.
sentences.zh: 阿姆斯特朗表示，该公司还将尝试由工程师、设计师和产品经理组成的“一人团队”。

blocks.html_en: Crypto.com

sentences.en: Crypto.com
Kris Marszalek announced 12% cuts at Crypto.com on March 19.
sentences.zh: Kris Marszalek 于 3 月 19 日宣布 Crypto.com 裁员 12%。

sentences.en: Marco Bello/Reuters
sentences.zh: 马可·贝洛/路透社

blocks.html_en: Crypto.com announced on March 19 that it would cut 12% of its staff. The CEO, Kris Marszalek, wrote in a post on X that those impacted were in "roles that do not adapt in our new world."

sentences.en: Crypto.com announced on March 19 that it would cut 12% of its staff.
sentences.zh: Crypto.com 3 月 19 日宣布将裁员 12%。

sentences.en: The CEO, Kris Marszalek, wrote in a post on X that those impacted were in "roles that do not adapt in our new world."
sentences.zh: 首席执行官 Kris Marszalek 在 X 上的一篇帖子中写道，受影响的人“扮演着不适应我们新世界的角色”。

blocks.html_en: "We are joining the list of companies integrating enterprise-wide AI," Marszalek wrote on X. "Companies that move immediately and pair the best AI tools with top-performers will achieve a level of scale and precision that was previously impossible. This is where we must go."

sentences.en: "We are joining the list of companies integrating enterprise-wide AI," Marszalek wrote on X.
sentences.zh: Marszalek 在 X 上写道：“我们正在加入集成企业级人工智能的公司名单。”

sentences.en: "Companies that move immediately and pair the best AI tools with top-performers will achieve a level of scale and precision that was previously impossible.
sentences.zh: “立即行动并将最好的人工智能工具与表现最佳的公司结合起来的公司将达到以前不可能实现的规模和精度水平。

sentences.en: This is where we must go."
sentences.zh: 这是我们必须去的地方。”

blocks.html_en: The company previously cut jobs in 2022 during a cryptocurrency slump and another 20% of its workforce in 2023, following the collapse of FTX.

sentences.en: The company previously cut jobs in 2022 during a cryptocurrency slump and another 20% of its workforce in 2023, following the collapse of FTX.
sentences.zh: 该公司此前曾于 2022 年加密货币暴跌期间裁员，并于 2023 年 FTX 倒闭后又裁员 20%。

blocks.html_en: GitLab

sentences.en: GitLab
GitLab said it is cutting 350 employees.
sentences.zh: GitLab 表示将裁员 350 名员工。

sentences.en: Joan Cros/NurPhoto via Getty Images
sentences.zh: 琼·克罗斯/NurPhoto 来自盖蒂图片社

blocks.html_en: On a June 2 earnings call, GitLab said it is cutting 350 employees, or about 14% of its workforce, as part of an overhaul it announced last month.

sentences.en: On a June 2 earnings call, GitLab said it is cutting 350 employees, or about 14% of its workforce, as part of an overhaul it announced last month.
sentences.zh: 在 6 月 2 日的财报电话会议上，GitLab 表示，作为上个月宣布的改革的一部分，它将裁员 350 名员工，约占员工总数的 14%。

blocks.html_en: The coding software company, which had 2,580 employees as of January, said in May that it was restructuring to meet the "agentic era." GitLab added that it wanted to remove up to three layers of management and reinvest savings from the restructuring into internal AI resources.

sentences.en: The coding software company, which had 2,580 employees as of January, said in May that it was restructuring to meet the "agentic era."
sentences.zh: 截至 1 月份，这家编码软件公司拥有 2,580 名员工，该公司在 5 月份表示正在进行重组，以迎接“代理时代”。

sentences.en: GitLab added that it wanted to remove up to three layers of management and reinvest savings from the restructuring into internal AI resources.
sentences.zh: 亚搏体育appGitLab补充说，它希望取消最多三层管理，并将重组中节省的资金重新投入到内部人工智能资源中。

blocks.html_en: The company said it also expects to exit 22 countries and reduce its team members' geographic footprint by about 37%, opting for customers in those regions to be served by partners.

sentences.en: The company said it also expects to exit 22 countries and reduce its team members' geographic footprint by about 37%, opting for customers in those regions to be served by partners.
sentences.zh: 该公司表示，还预计退出 22 个国家，并将团队成员的地理足迹减少约 37%，选择由合作伙伴为这些地区的客户提供服务。

blocks.html_en: In June 2025, GitLab's chief financial officer, Brian Robins, said that AI coding has been good for its business, as customers added more employees to their subscriptions and produced more code, which GitLab's services help manage.

sentences.en: In June 2025, GitLab's chief financial officer, Brian Robins, said that AI coding has been good for its business, as customers added more employees to their subscriptions and produced more code, which GitLab's services help manage.
sentences.zh: 2025 年 6 月，GitLab 首席财务官 Brian Robins 表示，人工智能编码对其业务有利，因为客户在其订阅中添加了更多员工并生成了更多代码，而 GitLab 的服务可以帮助管理这些代码。

sentences.en: HP CEO Enrique Lores.

sentences.en: HP Inc.
sentences.zh: 惠普公司

blocks.html_en: HP said it's reducing the size of its corporate workforce due to AI initiatives. In an earnings report last November, the company said it plans to cut between 4,000 and 6,000 jobs by the end of 2028, estimating the changes would save around $1 billion.

sentences.en: HP said it's reducing the size of its corporate workforce due to AI initiatives.
sentences.zh: 惠普表示，由于人工智能计划，该公司正在缩减企业员工规模。

sentences.en: In an earnings report last November, the company said it plans to cut between 4,000 and 6,000 jobs by the end of 2028, estimating the changes would save around $1 billion.
sentences.zh: 在去年 11 月的一份收益报告中，该公司表示计划到 2028 年底裁员 4,000 至 6,000 人，估计这些变化将节省约 10 亿美元。

blocks.html_en: HP's earnings presentation at the time said part of its strategy was to cut costs through "workforce reductions, platform simplification, programs consolidation, and productivity measures" and to increase customer satisfaction, innovation, and productivity with "artificial intelligence adoption and enablement."

sentences.en: HP's earnings presentation at the time said part of its strategy was to cut costs through "workforce reductions, platform simplification, programs consolidation, and productivity measures" and to increase customer satisfaction, innovation, and productivity with "artificial intelligence adoption and enablement."
sentences.zh: 惠普当时的财报表示，其战略的一部分是通过“裁员、平台简化、程序整合和生产力措施”来削减成本，并通过“人工智能的采用和启用”来提高客户满意度、创新和生产力。

blocks.html_en: IBM

sentences.en: IBM's CEO has said the company has replaced hundreds of employees with AI.
sentences.zh: IBM 首席执行官表示，该公司已用人工智能取代了数百名员工。

sentences.en: Sajjad Hussain/Getty Images
sentences.zh: 萨贾德·侯赛因/盖蒂图片社

blocks.html_en: Arvind Krishna, CEO of IBM, told The Wall Street Journal last year that it had replaced hundreds of human resources employees with AI.

sentences.en: Arvind Krishna, CEO of IBM, told The Wall Street Journal last year that it had replaced hundreds of human resources employees with AI.
sentences.zh: IBM 首席执行官 Arvind Krishna 去年告诉《华尔街日报》，该公司已用人工智能取代了数百名人力资源员工。

blocks.html_en: More recently, the company announced last November that it would cut thousands of workers in the fourth quarter of 2025, affecting a "single-digit percentage of its global workforce." Its CEO, Arvind Krishna, said the company is shifting priorities to hire more people around AI and quantum. He also said the company plans to increase hiring among recent college graduates over the next year.

sentences.en: More recently, the company announced last November that it would cut thousands of workers in the fourth quarter of 2025, affecting a "single-digit percentage of its global workforce."
sentences.zh: 最近，该公司去年 11 月宣布，将在 2025 年第四季度裁员数千人，影响“全球劳动力的个位数百分比”。

sentences.en: Its CEO, Arvind Krishna, said the company is shifting priorities to hire more people around AI and quantum.
sentences.zh: 其首席执行官 Arvind Krishna 表示，该公司正在改变优先事项，聘请更多人工智能和量子相关人员。

sentences.en: He also said the company plans to increase hiring among recent college graduates over the next year.
sentences.zh: 他还表示，该公司计划在明年增加应届大学毕业生的招聘。

blocks.html_en: Krishna has also said that AI adoption has led the company to hire more employees in programming and sales.

sentences.en: Krishna has also said that AI adoption has led the company to hire more employees in programming and sales.
sentences.zh: 克里希纳还表示，人工智能的采用导致公司雇用了更多的编程和销售员工。

blocks.html_en: In 2023, Krishna told Bloomberg that IBM had halted or slowed hiring for back-office roles, like in human resources, that could be replaced by AI.

sentences.en: In 2023, Krishna told Bloomberg that IBM had halted or slowed hiring for back-office roles, like in human resources, that could be replaced by AI.
sentences.zh: 2023 年，克里希纳告诉彭博社，IBM 已停止或减缓了后台职位的招聘，例如人力资源领域，这些职位可能会被人工智能取代。

blocks.html_en: "I could easily see 30% of that getting replaced by AI and automation over a five-year period," he told the outlet at the time.

sentences.en: "I could easily see 30% of that getting replaced by AI and automation over a five-year period," he told the outlet at the time.
sentences.zh: 他当时对媒体表示：“我可以很容易地看到，在五年内，其中 30% 会被人工智能和自动化所取代。”

blocks.html_en: Oracle

sentences.en: Oracle
sentences.zh: 甲骨文

sentences.en: Oracle's workforce shrank 13% in its most recent fiscal year.
sentences.zh: 甲骨文在最近一个财年的员工人数减少了 13%。

sentences.en: Bloomberg/Getty Images
sentences.zh: 彭博社/盖蒂图片社

blocks.html_en: Oracle said in a June 22 filing that AI is contributing to workforce reductions. The company's headcount fell by roughly 21,000 employees, or 13%, over the past year. Oracle reported 141,000 employees as of May 31.

sentences.en: Oracle said in a June 22 filing that AI is contributing to workforce reductions.
sentences.zh: 甲骨文在 6 月 22 日的一份文件中表示，人工智能正在为裁员做出贡献。

sentences.en: The company's headcount fell by roughly 21,000 employees, or 13%, over the past year.
sentences.zh: 去年，该公司的员工人数减少了约 21,000 人，即 13%。

sentences.en: Oracle reported 141,000 employees as of May 31.
sentences.zh: 截至 5 月 31 日，Oracle 共有 141,000 名员工。

blocks.html_en: The cuts come as Oracle invests heavily in AI infrastructure.

sentences.en: The cuts come as Oracle invests heavily in AI infrastructure.
sentences.zh: 此次裁员正值甲骨文大力投资人工智能基础设施之际。

blocks.html_en: "The adoption and deployment of AI technologies across our operations have resulted, and may continue to result, in reductions to our workforce," Oracle said in the filing.

sentences.en: "The adoption and deployment of AI technologies across our operations have resulted, and may continue to result, in reductions to our workforce," Oracle said in the filing.
sentences.zh: 甲骨文在文件中表示：“在我们的运营中采用和部署人工智能技术已经并可能继续导致我们的员工人数减少。”

blocks.html_en: The company spent $1.84 billion on severance and other restructuring costs in fiscal 2026, up from $374 million a year earlier.

sentences.en: The company spent $1.84 billion on severance and other restructuring costs in fiscal 2026, up from $374 million a year earlier.
sentences.zh: 2026 财年，该公司在遣散费和其他重组成本上花费了 18.4 亿美元，高于上年同期的 3.74 亿美元。

blocks.html_en: Salesforce

sentences.en: Salesforce
sentences.zh: 销售人员

sentences.en: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff.
sentences.zh: Salesforce 首席执行官马克·贝尼奥夫。

sentences.en: AP Photo/Markus Schreiber
sentences.zh: 美联社照片/马库斯·施赖伯

blocks.html_en: Salesforce cut fewer than 1,000 workers in February, including employees from marketing, product management, data analytics, and its Agentforce AI product.

sentences.en: Salesforce cut fewer than 1,000 workers in February, including employees from marketing, product management, data analytics, and its Agentforce AI product.
sentences.zh: Salesforce 2 月份裁减了不到 1,000 名员工，其中包括营销、产品管理、数据分析及其 Agentforce AI 产品部门的员工。

blocks.html_en: In an episode of "The Logan Bartlett Show" released last August, Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff said the company was using AI agents in its customer support division to replace humans and handle more sales leads.

sentences.en: In an episode of "The Logan Bartlett Show" released last August, Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff said the company was using AI agents in its customer support division to replace humans and handle more sales leads.
sentences.zh: 在去年 8 月发布的“The Logan Bartlett Show”一集中，Salesforce 首席执行官马克·贝尼奥夫 (Marc Benioff) 表示，该公司正在其客户支持部门使用人工智能代理来取代人类并处理更多销售线索。

blocks.html_en: "I was able to rebalance my head count on my support," he said in the interview. "I've reduced it from 9,000 heads to about 5,000 because I need less heads."

sentences.en: "I was able to rebalance my head count on my support," he said in the interview.
sentences.zh: “在我的支持下，我能够重新平衡我的人数，”他在采访中说。

sentences.en: "I've reduced it from 9,000 heads to about 5,000 because I need less heads."
sentences.zh: “我已将其数量从 9,000 颗减少到约 5,000 颗，因为我需要更少的头。”

blocks.html_en: A Salesforce spokesperson previously told Business Insider that Benioff was referring to an organizational transformation that took place over several months to reshape its customer support function.

sentences.en: A Salesforce spokesperson previously told Business Insider that Benioff was referring to an organizational transformation that took place over several months to reshape its customer support function.
sentences.zh: Salesforce 发言人此前告诉《商业内幕》，贝尼奥夫指的是历时数月的组织转型，旨在重塑其客户支持职能。

blocks.html_en: After deploying Agentforce, the company no longer needed to "actively backfill support engineer roles," the spokesperson said, adding that it successfully redeployed hundreds of employees into other areas of the company, like professional services, sales, and customer success.

sentences.en: After deploying Agentforce, the company no longer needed to "actively backfill support engineer roles," the spokesperson said, adding that it successfully redeployed hundreds of employees into other areas of the company, like professional services, sales, and customer success.
sentences.zh: 该发言人表示，部署 Agentforce 后，该公司不再需要“积极填补支持工程师职位”，并补充说，该公司已成功将数百名员工重新部署到公司的其他领域，例如专业服务、销售和客户成功。

blocks.html_en: Snap

sentences.en: Evan Spiegel is the CEO of Snap.
sentences.zh: 埃文·斯皮格尔是 Snap 的首席执行官。

sentences.en: Bloomberg/Getty Images
sentences.zh: 彭博社/盖蒂图片社

blocks.html_en: In a memo to employees released in a regulatory filing on April 15, Snap CEO Evan Spiegel said the company would cut 1,000 employees, or about 16% of its global workforce. The CEO cited "rapid advancements" in AI and "small squads" using it to become more efficient.

sentences.en: In a memo to employees released in a regulatory filing on April 15, Snap CEO Evan Spiegel said the company would cut 1,000 employees, or about 16% of its global workforce.
sentences.zh: 在 4 月 15 日向监管机构提交的一份给员工的备忘录中，Snap 首席执行官埃文·斯皮格尔 (Evan Spiegel) 表示，该公司将裁员 1000 名员工，约占全球员工总数的 16%。

sentences.en: The CEO cited "rapid advancements" in AI and "small squads" using it to become more efficient.
sentences.zh: 这位首席执行官引用了人工智能的“快速进步”和“小团队”利用它来提高效率。

blocks.html_en: Spiegel said Snap would also close more than 300 open roles, and that US-based employees would receive four months of severance, healthcare coverage, and equity vesting. In an investor update included in the company's filing, it said the layoffs would result in roughly $500 million in annualized cost savings.

sentences.en: Spiegel said Snap would also close more than 300 open roles, and that US-based employees would receive four months of severance, healthcare coverage, and equity vesting.
sentences.zh: Spiegel 表示，Snap 还将关闭 300 多个空缺职位，美国员工将获得四个月的遣散费、医疗保险和股权归属。

sentences.en: In an investor update included in the company's filing, it said the layoffs would result in roughly $500 million in annualized cost savings.
sentences.zh: 在该公司提交的文件中包含的投资者更新中，该公司表示，裁员将导致每年节省约 5 亿美元的成本。

sentences.en: Standard Chartered
sentences.zh: 渣打银行

sentences.zh: 彭博社/盖蒂图片社

blocks.html_en: Global bank Standard Chartered announced plans on May 19 to slash 15% of its staff by 2030.

sentences.en: Global bank Standard Chartered announced plans on May 19 to slash 15% of its staff by 2030.
sentences.zh: 全球银行渣打银行于 5 月 19 日宣布，计划到 2030 年裁员 15%。

blocks.html_en: CEO Bill Winters said in a media briefing in Hong Kong that the move isn't a cost-cutting effort, but rather, "replacing, in some cases, lower-value human capital with the financial capital and the investment capital that we are putting in," Bloomberg reported.

sentences.en: CEO Bill Winters said in a media briefing in Hong Kong that the move isn't a cost-cutting effort, but rather, "replacing, in some cases, lower-value human capital with the financial capital and the investment capital that we are putting in," Bloomberg reported.
sentences.zh: 据彭博社报道，首席执行官比尔·温特斯在香港举行的媒体吹风会上表示，此举并不是为了削减成本，而是“在某些情况下，用我们投入的金融资本和投资资本取代低价值的人力资本”。

blocks.html_en: "We don't have job losses, but we do have job role reductions in favor of the machines, and that will accelerate as we go forward into AI," he said at the briefing.

sentences.en: "We don't have job losses, but we do have job role reductions in favor of the machines, and that will accelerate as we go forward into AI," he said at the briefing.
sentences.zh: 他在简报中表示：“我们没有失业，但我们确实减少了工作岗位，以支持机器，随着我们向人工智能迈进，这种情况将会加速。”

blocks.html_en: The company added in a statement: "We are combining the best human talent with AI, investing to support our people into higher-value roles."

sentences.en: The company added in a statement: "We are combining the best human talent with AI, investing to support our people into higher-value roles."
sentences.zh: 该公司在一份声明中补充道：“我们正在将最优秀的人才与人工智能相结合，投资支持我们的员工担任更高价值的角色。”

blocks.html_en: Uber laid off about 10% of its customer service workers and asked remote workers to relocate to a city with an office and work there three days a week, it said in a statement on July 23. Bloomberg earlier reported the news.

sentences.en: Uber laid off about 10% of its customer service workers and asked remote workers to relocate to a city with an office and work there three days a week, it said in a statement on July 23.

blocks.html_en: Uber's vice president of global community operations, Megha Yethadka, wrote in a memo to the team on July 22 that AI provides "a massive opportunity" to "accelerate output, improve quality, and scale customer solutions at pace."

sentences.en: Uber's vice president of global community operations, Megha Yethadka, wrote in a memo to the team on July 22 that AI provides "a massive opportunity" to "accelerate output, improve quality, and scale customer solutions at pace."

blocks.html_en: Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi has said that the company is slowing down hiring as it invests more in AI.

blocks.html_en: Zubin Appoo, the CEO of Wisetech, said the logistics software maker is cutting 2,000 jobs, or 30% of its staff, because of AI-led efficiency.

sentences.en: Zubin Appoo, the CEO of Wisetech, said the logistics software maker is cutting 2,000 jobs, or 30% of its staff, because of AI-led efficiency.

blocks.html_en: In a conference call on February 25, Appoo said that AI enables greater productivity in less time and with fewer employees. The Sydney-based company employed about 7,000 people, according to an annual report released in October.

sentences.en: In a conference call on February 25, Appoo said that AI enables greater productivity in less time and with fewer employees.

blocks.html_en: Wix announced it would be cutting 20% of its workforce, citing currency challenges and AI. In a post on X on May 28, Wix CEO Avishai Abrahami shared the layoff memo he sent to the team, saying that the first reason for the cuts was that the "exchange rate between the Shekel and the US dollar has shifted significantly."

sentences.en: Wix announced it would be cutting 20% of its workforce, citing currency challenges and AI.

sentences.zh: 5 月 28 日，Wix 首席执行官 Avishai Abrahami 在 X 上发帖分享了他发给团队的裁员备忘录，称裁员的首要原因是“谢克尔与美元之间的汇率发生了显着变化”。

blocks.html_en: "This is not just about adopting new tools - it is about rewiring how companies are built, how they think, how they manage and how they operate," Abrahami wrote in the post.

blocks.html_en: Abrahami said the company will operate leaner and flatter, and will continue to take steps toward an AI-native way of working. The company previously employed just under 5,300 workers, meaning roughly 1,000 roles will be affected.

作者：Ana Altchek 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。 , Kelsey Vlamis 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。 , Shubhangi Goel 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。 , Katherine (Tangalakis-Lippert) Ortiz 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。 ，谭辉冷 你正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。

最近，人们对人工智能有一天会取代人类工人的担忧愈演愈烈——事实证明，未来可能就在这里。

许多公司最近宣布裁员，并将人工智能效率作为主要原因。

职业转型公司 Challenger、Grey 和 Christmas 3 月份的一份报告发现，今年到目前为止，8% 的裁员计划中都提到了人工智能。

在这波裁员潮中，一些人质疑人工智能是否正在取代人类曾经担任的如此多的角色，或者是否存在某种程度的“人工智能清洗”在起作用。 OpenAI 的 Sam Altman 表示，一些公司将裁员归咎于人工智能，而裁员无论如何都会发生。

麻省理工学院去年发布的一项研究称，迄今为止，95%的企业人工智能投资产生了“零回报”。

随着一些公司用技术取代人类工人，他们最终可能会因此而雇用更多的人，或者至少重新雇用一些被他们淘汰的职位。 咨询公司 Robert Half 进行的 2025 年调查发现，2000 名招聘经理中有 29% 表示，他们在实施人工智能后重新开设了之前被裁掉的职位。

以下是已进行人工智能相关裁员的公司名单：

Angi

Angi 是一家颇受欢迎的承包商列表网站，之前被称为 Angie's List，该网站在一月份表示，该公司将裁员约 350 人，部分原因是“人工智能驱动的效率提高”。

该公司补充说，此次裁员是“减少运营费用并优化组织结构以支持长期增长”计划的一部分。

阿特拉斯

Atlassian 3 月份宣布裁员 1,600 人，约占其全球员工总数的 10%。 此举出台之际，这家澳美软件公司表示正在重组，以专注于人工智能和企业增长。

该公司在向美国证券交易委员会提交的文件中表示，此次裁员是为适应首席执行官迈克·坎农-布鲁克斯所说的“人工智能时代”而重新定位业务的更广泛努力的一部分。

“假装人工智能不会改变我们所需的技能组合或某些领域所需的角色数量是不诚实的。 确实如此，”坎农-布鲁克斯在给员工的一封信中写道。

在去年 10 月裁员之前的“2​​0VC”播客中，Cannon-Brookes 表示，他计划在五年内为公司增加更多工程师。

“他们的效率会更高，但技术创造不受产出限制，”坎农-布鲁克斯说。

Block

亿万富翁、Block 首席执行官杰克·多尔西 (Jack Dorsey) 在 2 月份 X 上的一篇帖子中表示，他将裁减 Block 近一半的员工，将其 10,000 多名员工削减至 6,000 人以下。 他表示，业务强劲、利润不断增长，但一种新的工作方式正在出现，因此采取了这一举措。

多尔西在关于 X 的备忘录中表示：“我们已经看到，我们正在创建和使用的情报工具，与更小、更扁平的团队相结合，正在实现一种新的工作方式，从根本上改变了创建和运营公司的意义。”

在备忘录发布后的公司财报电话会议上，多尔西表示，更多公司将效仿，利用人工智能来提高效率。 这位首席执行官表示，Block 已经领先于“所有公司最终都会”采用的趋势。

Cisco

根据首席执行官查克·罗宾斯 (Chuck Robbins) 发给员工的一份备忘录，思科于 5 月 13 日表示，随着该网络公司围绕人工智能进行重组，该公司将裁员“不到 4,000 个职位”。

罗宾斯在备忘录中表示：“在人工智能时代获胜的公司将是那些具有专注力、紧迫感和纪律性的公司，能够不断将投资转向需求和长期价值创造最强的领域。” “这意味着要做出艰难的决定——关于我们的投资地点、我们的组织方式以及我们的成本结构如何反映我们面前的机会。”

此次裁员占思科员工总数的不到 5%，是在发布强于预期的第三季度收益报告的同时宣布的，该报告在人工智能基础设施需求激增的情况下上调了收入预期。

罗宾斯在备忘录中表示，思科正在将投资转向“需求和长期价值创造最强的领域”，包括芯片、光学、安全以及全公司员工对人工智能的使用。

云耀

Cloudflare 于 5 月 7 日宣布，将裁员 1,100 多人，为“代理人工智能时代”进行重组。 这家网络安全公司在一份备忘录中表示，过去三个月其人工智能使用量增加了 600% 以上，各部门的员工每天运行数千次代理会话。

该公司在给员工的备忘录中表示：“这意味着我们必须有意识地为代理人工智能时代设计我们的公司，以增强我们为客户提供的价值。”

Cloudflare 首席执行官 Matthew Prince 回应了 X 上的一篇批评帖子，称“很少有工程师或面向客户的销售人员受到我们裁员的影响。”

他写道，该公司将继续“疯狂地招聘这些职位”，就像初创公司那样。 截至 3 月底，Cloudflare 拥有 5,483 名员工，这意味着裁员影响了约 20% 的员工。

币库

Coinbase 首席执行官布莱恩·阿姆斯特朗 (Brian Armstrong) 宣布，该公司将裁员 14%，即约 700 名员工。

在 5 月 5 日的 X 帖子中，阿姆斯特朗分享了一封电子邮件，他说这封电子邮件是他当天早些时候发送给工人的。 在帖子中，他列举了两个因素：波动的市场和人工智能改变人们的工作方式。

阿姆斯特朗说：“在过去的一年里，我看到工程师们使用人工智能在几天内就完成了团队过去需要几周的时间。”他补充说，“一个小型、专注的团队可能实现的速度已经发生了巨大的变化。”

阿姆斯特朗表示，该公司不仅减少员工数量和削减成本，而且“从根本上改变”其运营方式。 这位首席执行官表示，Coinbase 正在将自己重建为“一种智能，由人类在边缘调整它”。

他分享了将劳动力集中在人工智能原生吊舱周围的计划，这些吊舱将管理代理队。 阿姆斯特朗表示，该公司还将尝试由工程师、设计师和产品经理组成的“一人团队”。

Crypto.com

Crypto.com 3 月 19 日宣布将裁员 12%。 首席执行官 Kris Marszalek 在 X 上的一篇帖子中写道，受影响的人“扮演着不适应我们新世界的角色”。

Marszalek 在 X 上写道：“我们正在加入集成企业级人工智能的公司名单。” “立即行动并将最好的人工智能工具与表现最佳的公司结合起来的公司将达到以前不可能实现的规模和精度水平。 这是我们必须去的地方。”

该公司此前曾于 2022 年加密货币暴跌期间裁员，并于 2023 年 FTX 倒闭后又裁员 20%。

GitLab

在 6 月 2 日的财报电话会议上，GitLab 表示，作为上个月宣布的改革的一部分，它将裁员 350 名员工，约占员工总数的 14%。

截至 1 月份，这家编码软件公司拥有 2,580 名员工，该公司在 5 月份表示正在进行重组，以迎接“代理时代”。 亚搏体育appGitLab补充说，它希望取消最多三层管理，并将重组中节省的资金重新投入到内部人工智能资源中。

该公司表示，还预计退出 22 个国家，并将团队成员的地理足迹减少约 37%，选择由合作伙伴为这些地区的客户提供服务。

2025 年 6 月，GitLab 首席财务官 Brian Robins 表示，人工智能编码对其业务有利，因为客户在其订阅中添加了更多员工并生成了更多代码，而 GitLab 的服务可以帮助管理这些代码。

HP

惠普表示，由于人工智能计划，该公司正在缩减企业员工规模。 在去年 11 月的一份收益报告中，该公司表示计划到 2028 年底裁员 4,000 至 6,000 人，估计这些变化将节省约 10 亿美元。

惠普当时的财报表示，其战略的一部分是通过“裁员、平台简化、程序整合和生产力措施”来削减成本，并通过“人工智能的采用和启用”来提高客户满意度、创新和生产力。

IBM

IBM 首席执行官 Arvind Krishna 去年告诉《华尔街日报》，该公司已用人工智能取代了数百名人力资源员工。

最近，该公司去年 11 月宣布，将在 2025 年第四季度裁员数千人，影响“全球劳动力的个位数百分比”。 其首席执行官 Arvind Krishna 表示，该公司正在改变优先事项，聘请更多人工智能和量子相关人员。 他还表示，该公司计划在明年增加应届大学毕业生的招聘。

克里希纳还表示，人工智能的采用导致公司雇用了更多的编程和销售员工。

2023 年，克里希纳告诉彭博社，IBM 已停止或减缓了后台职位的招聘，例如人力资源领域，这些职位可能会被人工智能取代。

他当时对媒体表示：“我可以很容易地看到，在五年内，其中 30% 会被人工智能和自动化所取代。”

甲骨文

甲骨文在 6 月 22 日的一份文件中表示，人工智能正在为裁员做出贡献。 去年，该公司的员工人数减少了约 21,000 人，即 13%。 截至 5 月 31 日，Oracle 共有 141,000 名员工。

此次裁员正值甲骨文大力投资人工智能基础设施之际。

甲骨文在文件中表示：“在我们的运营中采用和部署人工智能技术已经并可能继续导致我们的员工人数减少。”

2026 财年，该公司在遣散费和其他重组成本上花费了 18.4 亿美元，高于上年同期的 3.74 亿美元。

销售人员

Salesforce 2 月份裁减了不到 1,000 名员工，其中包括营销、产品管理、数据分析及其 Agentforce AI 产品部门的员工。

在去年 8 月发布的“The Logan Bartlett Show”一集中，Salesforce 首席执行官马克·贝尼奥夫 (Marc Benioff) 表示，该公司正在其客户支持部门使用人工智能代理来取代人类并处理更多销售线索。

“在我的支持下，我能够重新平衡我的人数，”他在采访中说。 “我已将其数量从 9,000 颗减少到约 5,000 颗，因为我需要更少的头。”

Salesforce 发言人此前告诉《商业内幕》，贝尼奥夫指的是历时数月的组织转型，旨在重塑其客户支持职能。

该发言人表示，部署 Agentforce 后，该公司不再需要“积极填补支持工程师职位”，并补充说，该公司已成功将数百名员工重新部署到公司的其他领域，例如专业服务、销售和客户成功。

Snap

在 4 月 15 日向监管机构提交的一份给员工的备忘录中，Snap 首席执行官埃文·斯皮格尔 (Evan Spiegel) 表示，该公司将裁员 1000 名员工，约占全球员工总数的 16%。 这位首席执行官引用了人工智能的“快速进步”和“小团队”利用它来提高效率。

Spiegel 表示，Snap 还将关闭 300 多个空缺职位，美国员工将获得四个月的遣散费、医疗保险和股权归属。 在该公司提交的文件中包含的投资者更新中，该公司表示，裁员将导致每年节省约 5 亿美元的成本。

渣打银行

全球银行渣打银行于 5 月 19 日宣布，计划到 2030 年裁员 15%。

据彭博社报道，首席执行官比尔·温特斯在香港举行的媒体吹风会上表示，此举并不是为了削减成本，而是“在某些情况下，用我们投入的金融资本和投资资本取代低价值的人力资本”。

他在简报中表示：“我们没有失业，但我们确实减少了工作岗位，以支持机器，随着我们向人工智能迈进，这种情况将会加速。”

该公司在一份声明中补充道：“我们正在将最优秀的人才与人工智能相结合，投资支持我们的员工担任更高价值的角色。”

Uber

Uber 在 7 月 23 日的一份声明中表示，解雇了约 10% 的客户服务人员，并要求远程员工搬到有办公室的城市，每周工作三天。 彭博社早些时候报道了这一消息。

Uber 全球社区运营副总裁 Megha Yethadka 在 7 月 22 日给团队的一份备忘录中写道，人工智能为“加速产出、提高质量和快速扩展客户解决方案”提供了“巨大的机会”。

Uber 首席执行官达拉·科斯罗萨西 (Dara Khosrowshahi) 表示，该公司正在放慢招聘速度，因为它加大了对人工智能的投资。

慧智科技

Wisetech 首席执行官 Zubin Appoo 表示，由于人工智能主导的效率提升，这家物流软件制造商将裁员 2,000 人，即员工总数的 30%。

在 2 月 25 日的电话会议上，Appoo 表示，人工智能可以在更短的时间内、用更少的员工来提高生产力。 根据 10 月份发布的年度报告，这家总部位于悉尼的公司雇用了约 7,000 名员工。

“我准备明确地说：手动编写代码作为工程核心行为的时代已经结束，”Appoo 说。 该技术“释放了慧咨科技之前无法达到的效率提升水平”。

他补充说，在某些劳动力领域，例如客户服务，二分之一的员工将会消失。

Wix

Wix 宣布将裁员 20%，理由是货币挑战和人工智能。 5 月 28 日，Wix 首席执行官 Avishai Abrahami 在 X 上发帖分享了他发给团队的裁员备忘录，称裁员的首要原因是“谢克尔与美元之间的汇率发生了显着变化”。

他还提到了“人工智能能力的快速发展”。

亚伯拉罕米在帖子中写道：“这不仅仅是采用新工具，而是重新构建公司的构建方式、思维方式、管理方式和运营方式。”

亚伯拉罕米表示，公司将更加精简、扁平化运营，并将继续采取措施实现人工智能原生的工作方式。 该公司此前雇用了不到 5,300 名员工，这意味着大约 1,000 个职位将受到影响。

更正：2026 年 5 月 19 日——这个故事的早期版本包括克拉纳。 该公司表示尚未进行与人工智能相关的裁员。
